empty.title: Waiting for your first check
empty.subtitle: Once you review text, you'll see claim-level verdicts, evidence and available actions here.

single.intro: We have the results for your text
single.detailsLine1: It is a legacy output kept as an academic baseline, not the main checking flow.
single.detailsLine2: A value close to 0 means less defined patterns; use FEVER verification for evidence-backed explanation.
single.detailsLine3: High values indicate that the classifier finds a clear tendency in the text.

hero.subtitle: Switch modes in one click and process texts, URLs or CSV batches. Every plan checks claims; Ultra adds the full FEVER agent.

modes.taglineUrl: Extraction and checking from a web source
modes.taglineCsv: Bulk processing of claims in batch

analysisPanel.title: Configure the review
analysisPanel.textPlaceholder: Paste a verifiable claim or an informative excerpt...
analysisPanel.textLimits: Minimum {{min}} characters · maximum {{max}} for your plan
analysisPanel.urlHint: We extract headline, context and metadata to prepare a traceable verdict.
analysisPanel.csvHint: Upload a batch of headlines or claims to process in bulk.
analysisPanel.csvLockedUltra: CSV batch analysis unlocks on the Ultra plan.

home.subtitle: Usage, recent evolution and your latest analyses. All connected in real time with your account.
home.remainingTodayFoot: Daily quota available for your plan.
home.chartAria: Reviews per day in the last 10 days
home.emptyRecent: No recent reviews on your account yet.

history.subtitle: Review your latest verifications or expand any entry to inspect the overall verdict, how to read the result, extracted claims and linked evidence.
history.emptyHistory: You don't have any FEVER verifications in your history yet.
history.emptySearch: No results for that search. Try another keyword.
history.filterPlaceholder: Search by text, claim, evidence or verdict...

extension.subtitle: The extension reuses your FakeNews Insight account, respects your daily quota and lets you analyze selected text or launch claim verification with one click.
extension.compatibility: Compatible with Google Chrome and Microsoft Edge (Manifest V3).
extension.installSubtitle: For now the extension is installed manually in developer mode.

steps.title: Download the ZIP
steps.description: Click 'Download extension' to open the repository's Releases page and download the latest extension ZIP.

steps.title: Unzip the folder
steps.description: Extract the ZIP to a stable location on your computer (do not delete it while using the extension).

steps.title: Enable developer mode
steps.description: Open chrome://extensions or edge://extensions and turn on the 'Developer mode' toggle in the top-right corner.

steps.title: Load the unpacked extension
steps.description: Click 'Load unpacked' and pick the folder you just extracted. Pin the icon to the toolbar for easy access.

steps.title: Sign in
steps.description: Open the popup, use the same email and password as FakeNews Insight and start reviewing texts without leaving the page you're reading.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: This page will connect with Supabase to manage keys, rotation and API permissions.

password.title: Change password
password.oauthIntro: Your account was created with {{provider}}, so you can't change the password here. It is managed directly by {{provider}} and is not stored on our platform.
password.intro: For security, we'll ask for your current password before applying the change.
password.errorMismatch: The new password and its confirmation do not match.

subscription.title: Manage subscription
subscription.intro: Change plan, schedule the return to Free at the end of the cycle or reactivate a subscription from the plan selector.

planSelector.title: Choose your subscription
planSelector.subtitle: Pick the plan that best fits your needs.
planSelector.managePortalHint: Open the Stripe portal to update your card or view invoices.
planSelector.scheduledNoticeDowngrade: You keep your {{currentPlan}} plan for {{days}} more day(s). On {{date}} you'll move to {{nextPlan}}.
planSelector.scheduledNoticeCancel: Your subscription stays active {{days}} more day(s). On {{date}} you'll return to the FREE plan.
planSelector.proratedExplain: You'll only pay the prorated difference for the current period.
planSelector.downgradeExplain: You'll keep all the perks of your current plan until the billing cycle ends.
planSelector.confirmCancelBody: No additional charges. Your account will return to the FREE plan at period end.

feedback.checkoutRedirect: Taking you to Stripe to complete the payment...
feedback.upgradeSuccess: Plan upgraded to {{plan}}. Stripe charged only the prorated difference.
feedback.downgradeScheduled: Switch to {{plan}} scheduled. You keep your current plan for {{days}} more day(s).
feedback.cancelScheduled: Cancellation scheduled. You keep your plan for {{days}} more day(s).
feedback.checkoutCancelled: Payment cancelled. No charges were made.

delete.title: Delete account (GDPR)
delete.intro: This action is irreversible. We will delete your account and associated data. To confirm, type
delete.subscriptionNotice: If you have active subscriptions, they will be canceled immediately when you delete the account.
delete.errorPattern: Type DELETE in the field to confirm the deletion.

verify.title: Claim verification
verify.subtitle: Extracts claims from text, retrieves web evidence and computes FEVER/NLI labels.
verify.claimsIntro: These are the concrete claims the system extracted from the text to contrast them against web evidence.
verify.noEvidence: Not enough web evidence for this claim.

guide.title: How to read the result
guide.intro: The system does not decide whether a whole text is true in the abstract: it extracts claims, retrieves evidence and compares each evidence item with each claim using NLI.

verdicts.SUPPORTED: The retrieved evidence supports the claim.
verdicts.REFUTED: The retrieved evidence contradicts the claim.
verdicts.NOT_ENOUGH_INFO: There is not enough evidence to confirm or refute it. This does not mean the claim is false.
verdicts.CONFLICTING: The evidence is mixed: some items support the claim while others refute it. Review the sources.

guide.nliNote: Per-source labels show whether that specific evidence item supports, refutes or cannot decide the claim. Confidence is a model signal, not an absolute probability of truth.
